verdict.answer_first: B states the core actionable issue immediately: "most likely bug being an off-by-one in the offset math"; A opens with process commentary: "Reviewing this snippet directly".
verdict.decisiveness: B gives a direct replacement snippet: "const page = Math.max(1, parseInt(req.query.page, 10) || 1)"; A's fix depends on an undefined "MAX_PAGE" and says "Adjust the `(page - 1)`".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it provides a short pasteable fix and clearly notes the only contract choice: "0- vs 1-indexed pages".
